Container.Name: open-webui
Container.Overview:
(Formerly Ollama WebUI) ChatGPT-Style Web Interface for various LLM runners, including Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs
IMPORTANT: Make sure to add the following environment variable to your ollama container - OLLAMA_ORIGINS=*
Set your OpenAI API key (not persistant) - OPENAI_API_KEY

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Sets the port to run Open WebUI from.

Config.Name: ENABLE_OLLAMA_API
Config.Description: Enables the use of Ollama APIs.

Config.Name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Configures the Ollama backend URL.

Config.Name: ENABLE_OPENAI_API
Config.Description: Enables the use of OpenAI APIs.

Config.Name: OPENAI_API_BASE_URL
Config.Description: Configures the OpenAI base API URL.

Config.Name: OPENAI_API_KEY
Config.Description: Sets the OpenAI API key, e.g. sk-124781258123.

Config.Name: WEBUI_AUTH
Config.Description: This setting enables or disables authentication.

Config.Name: CORS_ALLOW_ORIGIN
Config.Description: Sets the allowed origins for Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS). Smicolon ';' separated list of allowed origins.

Config.Name: ENABLE_CHANNELS
Config.Description: Enables or disables channel support.

Config.Name: ENABLE_FOLDERS
Config.Description: Enables or disables the folders feature, allowing users to organize their chats into folders in the sidebar.

Config.Name: ENABLE_NOTES
Config.Description: Enables or disables the notes feature, allowing users to create and manage personal notes within Open WebUI.

Config.Name: ENABLE_MEMORIES
Config.Description: Enables or disables the memory feature, allowing models to store and retrieve long-term information about users.

Config.Name: ENABLE_ADMIN_CHAT_ACCESS
Config.Description: Enables admin users to directly access the chats of other users.

Config.Name: ENABLE_ADMIN_ANALYTICS
Config.Description: Controls whether the Analytics tab is visible and accessible in the admin panel.

Config.Name: ENABLE_EASTER_EGGS
Config.Description: Enables or disables easter egg features in the UI, such as special themes. Set to False to hide these optional novelty features from users.

Config.Name: GLOBAL_LOG_LEVEL
Config.Description: Sets the global logging level for all Open WebUI components.

Config.Name: ENABLE_EVALUATION_ARENA_MODELS
Config.Description: Enables or disables evaluation arena models.

Config.Name: ENABLE_MESSAGE_RATING
Config.Description: Enables message rating feature.

Config.Name: ENABLE_COMMUNITY_SHARING
Config.Description: Controls whether users can share content with the Open WebUI Community and access community resources.

Config.Name: HTTP_PROXY
Config.Description: Proxy for HTTP.

Config.Name: HTTPS_PROXY
Config.Description: Proxy for HTTPS.

Config.Name: NO_PROXY
Config.Description: Comma-separate list of hosts/IPs that bypass the proxy.
